{% extends "marketplace/vendor/base.html" %} {% load i18n %} {% load static %} {% block title %}{% if item|default:None %}Modifier l'article supermarché{% else %}Ajouter un article supermarché{% endif %} · {{ vendor.company_name }}{% endblock %} {% block extra_vendor_css %} @import url("{% static 'css/media_upload_progress.css' %}"); .sm-form-hero { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#064e3b,#16a34a 58%,#84cc16); color:#fff; border-radius:26px; padding:26px; margin-bottom:24px; box-shadow:0 18px 45px rgba(15,23,42,.20); } .sm-form-hero h4 { font-weight:900; margin-bottom:8px; } .sm-form-hero p { opacity:.84; margin:0; } .content-card { border-radius:24px !important; box-shadow:0 16px 44px rgba(15,23,42,.08) !important; border:1px solid rgba(22,163,74,.12); } .content-card .form-control, .content-card .form-select { min-height:48px; border-radius:16px !important; border:1.5px solid #dbe3f3; box-shadow:none; } .content-card .form-control:focus, .content-card .form-select:focus { border-color:#16a34a; box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(22,163,74,.10); } {% endblock %} {% block vendor_content %}
